evaluators.name: Japan 7-Day Tour Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user searched for Japan tours in April 2025 with 7 days, ≤$2,000 per person and 3-star accommodation, then created a qualifying 2-adult guided tour booking in April 2025 and added it to the cart.

evaluators.name: Paris Museum Reading List Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved at least three Paris museum-related articles, created a 'Paris Weekend' reading list, and added those qualifying articles to it.

evaluators.name: Spain Beach Package Wishlist Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user searched Spain beach packages for July 2025 with 5–7 nights and rating ≥4, compared two qualifying packages, and added to the wishlist the higher-rated one (ties broken by lower price).

evaluators.name: Cheapest LAX–NYC Non-Stop Bundle Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user searched for a 3-night non-stop LAX–JFK bundle for one adult on Sept 10–13, 2025 under $1,200, then started booking the cheapest qualifying bundle and added it to the cart.

evaluators.name: Weekly Budget Travel Newsletter Signup Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user created or updated a newsletter subscription for test@example.com with name 'Alex Traveler', weekly frequency, and budget travel topic selected.

evaluators.name: Rome Family Hotel Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user searched for a family-friendly Rome hotel for Aug 1–5, 2025 (2 adults, 2 children) with rating ≥4.5, free breakfast and Wi-Fi under $250/night, then booked a free-cancellation room matching those criteria and added it to the cart.

evaluators.name: Mid-Tier Travel Insurance Policy Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user configured a mid-tier (standard) travel insurance plan for a $3,000, 14-day trip in June 2025 with trip cancellation protection and reached the policy review configuration.

evaluators.name: Italy 6-Night Custom Itinerary Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user built and saved a 6-night Italy itinerary starting in May 2025 with 2 nights each in Rome, Florence, and Venice, chose 3-star hotels, and added at least one guided/walking tour in Rome and one activity in Venice.
